# ABOUTME: Deliberate test secret fixture for the gitleaks bats test (Story 9.2-001).
# ABOUTME: NOT a real credential — a synthetic token that gitleaks must flag.
#
# This file exists so tests/gitleaks-secrets.bats can prove the secrets scanner
# catches a planted credential. The token below is fabricated and grants access
# to nothing. The fixture is path-allowlisted in .gitleaks.toml so it never
# blocks a commit or the CI gate; the bats test scans it with the stock default
# ruleset (no allowlist) to confirm detection works. Do not put a real secret
# here, and do not move it under an allowlisted example path.

github_pat = ghp_012345678901234567890123456789abcdef
